vendor.name: International Association of Computer Investigative Specialists

logistics.format: Two-phase certification: Peer Review (mentored practical problems) followed by independent Certification Phase (practical examination of multiple evidence images plus written knowledge test); FSAB (Forensic Specialties Accreditation Board) accredited; 3 years validity with renewal
